authority: agent-skills-curated demand and capability disposition only; not a portable standard, candidate execution authorization, or live runtime claim

demandRecord.title: Incomplete or tacit requirements, intent ambiguity, and compound-unit binding
demandRecord.demand: Preserve an open native fast path while binding material goal, target, mode, scope, source, output, verification, and compound-unit relations only when missing information would change action or authority.
sourceEvidence: The exact-byte research source records incomplete expression of goal, audience, boundary, and acceptance as a collaboration failure candidate.
The candidate taxonomy maps incomplete, tacit, or unstable requirement expression to P1 and P2.
The candidate matrix maps STM-11 through P1/P2 to SG-01 and assigns current process ownership to native intake plus intent-contract.
uncertainty: The upstream corpus is candidate evidence and does not prove a universal minimum field set or a Skill requirement.
Multilingual relation inference, tacit exploratory work, and over-splitting false positives remain condition-specific.
An unaccepted portable standard gap is not automatically a residual capability gap.
heldClaims: No universal intake schema, mandatory clarification interview, or always-on Hook is accepted.
No new Skill, adaptation, or repository-authored replacement is justified by coordinate membership alone.
recheckTriggers: repeated multilingual or compound-request coverage failure survives the current alternatives
native or intent-contract fast paths cause measurable over-questioning, over-splitting, latency, or context cost
a materially different external candidate or upstream evidence changes the comparison

alternatives.path: native interpretation and the smallest blocking question only when action or authority would change
intent-contract after native intake when source, target, scope, authority, or verification is materially incomplete
alternatives.evidence: current portable contract chain and SG-01 process-owner mapping

alternatives.path: skill.curated.grill-with-docs and skill.curated.ubiquitous-language for document-grounded challenge and terminology ambiguity
alternatives.evidence: approved registry, admissions, provenance, overlap review, and scenario.lifecycle-01
checked-in recipe evidence gates and failure policy

alternatives.path: record assumptions and stop decisions that depend on unanswered questions
responsible subject or domain owner supplies tacit goals, trade-offs, terminology, and acceptance authority
alternatives.evidence: affected-subject and domain-owner boundary in the source mapping

decision.nextGate: bind another source-supported unassessed lane; recheck this lane only on a listed failure, cost, candidate, or evidence trigger
